violations.text: The door to the outside (#13), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025

Wood is used in the construction of 3 bay sink splash board mounting. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
Walk-in cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
Food prep sink faucet observed leaking from handle and faucet when in use. Systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025

The door to the outside (#13), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025
Packaged foods were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Wood is used in the construction of 3 bay sink splash board mounting. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
Walk-in cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
Food prep sink faucet observed leaking from handle and faucet when in use. Systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025

The door to the outside (#13), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025
Packaged foods were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Wood is used in the construction of 3 bay sink splash board mounting. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
Walk-in cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

1. Food prep sink faucet observed leaking from handle and faucet when in use. 2. No discharge pipe was observed at pre-rinse basin at warewashing area. Systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. Gasket to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

-Per PIC garbage disposal at pre-rinse basin in warewashing area is in poor repair. Equipment is mis-wired. -Dishwashing machine observed leaking when in use. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. Gasket is to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets at the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The floors in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbant, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

Droppings observed in the storage room. Per interview of staff, establishment has active pest control. Establishment shall remove and clean the areas observed with droppings. If new droppings observed, establishment must contactva professional pest control service to do a full assessment/evaluation of facility. -Proof of pest control service must be provided to Inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

Oven doors and walk-in cooler doors were not in good repair. Both oven doors and walk-in cooler doors observed not tight-fitting. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and storage room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
The walls in the storage room area observed in poor repair. Holes observed on the walls. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
